headline: SEC Probes Alleged Insider Trades That Cost Susquehanna Millions
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The SEC is looking into Susquehanna International Group’s allegations that unknown insider traders made $100 million on options bets ahead of a recent Chinese regulatory crackdown on cross-border brokerages, according to a person familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergMeta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing PowerKrafton Agrees to Pay ‘Subnautica 2’ Bonuses as Developer’s CEO ResignsExxon to Change Name for First Time in Decades After RedomicileUS Decides A
